channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Business & Economic Policy
channel.description: Strictly Zimbabwe business, finance, mining, investment and economic-policy stories — curated from foreign press and policy press. Each item ships with a branded headline card for social autolists.

item.title: Harare traffic jams will only worsen – Mafume urges residents to ditch private cars
item.description: HARARE Mayor Jacob Mafume has renewed calls for residents to embrace public transport, saying that the capital’s worsening traffic congestion will only deteriorate unless more people abandon private vehicles for buses. Speaking at the Transparent International Zimbabwe (TI-Z) Int #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Powertel, Paratus activate cross-border fibre network linking Zimbabwe to Southern Africa
item.description: Powertel Communications has taken a major step towards becoming a leading Internet Service Provider (ISP) after the first phase of its landmark cross-border fibre partnership with Paratus Zimbabwe went live. The project has activated a new high-capacity digital corridor linking Z #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe is taking another major step to stop it from losing money from its lithium exports
item.description: Zimbabwe is taking another major step to stop it from losing money from its lithium exports — via Business Insider Africa #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Business Insider Africa

item.title: Stanbic Bank advances Zimbabwe’s mining sector with US$227 million loan funding
item.description: Stanbic Bank advances Zimbabwe’s mining sector with US$227 million loan funding — via African Mining Market #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Zimbabwe exploring minerals-backed deals with China to fund infrastructure, minister says @Reuters
item.description: Zimbabwe exploring minerals-backed deals with China to fund infrastructure, minister says — via Reuters #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: The Tech Stack Will Decide ZEEX. The ZSE Has Been Quietly Building Toward It
item.description: Whether Zimbabwe’s new SME exchange works will come down to the #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bradley Manyika

item.title: How a 42% reserve boost at one gold mine added $1 billion to Zimbabwe’s mining ambitions
item.description: How a 42% reserve boost at one gold mine added $1 billion to Zimbabwe’s mining ambitions — via Business Insider Africa #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: INVESCI Backs ZEEX: Zimbabwe’s New SME Exchange Lands Its First Institutional Partner @ZSE_ZW
